programme.title: The Mistress
programme.desc: A scheming woman becomes a pawn in her own diabolical game when a string of mysterious incidents land her face to face with her current target's wife.

programme.title: Last Night
programme.desc: The results of the baccalaureate are full of surprises.

programme.title: Mano Po 5: Gua Ai Di
programme.desc: A freewheeling veterinarian (Richard Gutierrez) tries to follow Chinese customs while wooing a tradition-minded Chinese woman (Angel Locsin).

programme.title: Garapal
programme.desc: A man is betrayed by his best friend after they steal a plate from a mint to make fake money. He decides to seek revenge and take back what is his.

programme.title: Jack en Poy
programme.desc: Jack, a young boy, and Poy, a girl, are sworn to each other in an arranged marriage. However, years later, Poy grows up to be a tomboy and Jack comes out as gay.

programme.title: Harry & Patty
programme.desc: Harry and Patty go from awkward acquaintances to head-over-heels lovers in no time. However, their fast-paced, dreamy romance hits a snag when the past starts interfering with the present.

programme.title: Maybe This Time
programme.desc: Steph learns to be tough and sets her sights on bigger dreams after Tonio ends their relationship without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Talahib At Rosas 2
programme.desc: Two childhood friends who now belong to two opposing camps cross paths once more and find themselves fighting a greedy land-grabber.

programme.title: To Mama With Love
programme.desc: When a father abandons his family to move to the United States, the daughters take it upon themselves to care for their mother, especially after her health begins to deteriorate.

programme.title: Mano Po 2: My Home
programme.desc: Half-sisters Sol, LuShui and Belinda come into conflict and deal with years of inner turmoil and resentment after their father is murdered.

programme.title: La Vida Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa and Dado are con artists, but are involved in different criminal activities.

programme.title: Maybe This Time
programme.desc: Steph learns to be tough and sets her sights on bigger dreams after Tonio ends their relationship without saying goodbye.

programme.title: 24/7 in Love
programme.desc: Jane (Kathryn Bernardo) wants to win tickets to Billy Fernandez's (Daniel Padilla) concert. She interviews several people and hears their love stories to figure out what she would do if the world were about to end.

programme.title: Magandang Hatinggabi
programme.desc: Teenagers experience a series of chilling events when they take a break from their road trip. Soon, they meet a heavily deformed man who tells them three hair-raising horror stories.

programme.title: Hesus, Rebolusyonaryo
programme.desc: Jesus Mariano, a young poet and revolutionary, decides to fight for his country, which is under military rule. Inspired by his childhood lover, he decides to change the rules.

programme.title: The Significant Other
programme.desc: A rising fashion model becomes friends with her idol. Things get complicated when they realize they are in love with the same man.

programme.title: Magic to Love
programme.desc: Xerox, an alien who is in love with RTW, a mannequin, lands on Earth to find his lover. In his search mission, he is helped by Twinkle and Boots.

programme.title: I Do? I Die!! (D'yos Ko Day!)
programme.desc: Unemployed duo Babalu and Mokong fail each time they apply for a job. They decide to rob a former employer in desperation.

programme.title: Makamandag na Bala
programme.desc: The soldiers Ricardo and Samuel stand in the way of the illegal activities of Mayor Antero Sanchez's son Tonie which cause danger in their lives.

programme.title: Shake, Rattle & Roll 8
programme.desc: A party takes place on a forbidden floor; a naughty child learns that her nanny is a vampire; a monster stalks accident survivors.

programme.title: Jologs
programme.desc: Filipinos (Diether Ocampo, Patrick Garcia, Vhong Navarro) from all different backgrounds deal with the intricacies of daily life.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When all the Westley Kids but Philly Phil get invited to a popular kid's party Philly Phil becomes determined to figure out exactly what it is about popular kid behavior that he doesn't grasp. The data he compiles on the subject he then uses to build a robot he calls BROC (Big Robot on Campus) which he endows with all the sure-fire popularity attributes he can think of thus making it possible for Philly Phil to ride into popularity on BROC's coattails. Surprisingly Philly Phil's plan seems to work... that is until things start backfiring when BROC begins treating Philly Phil as a social liability and starts scoring popularity points at Philly Phil's expense.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S2
programme.desc: Ruby and her friends struggle to grant the wish of a very intimidating and mysterious wisher.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

Cher’s influence extends beyond the stage, empowering generations with her fearlessness, resilience, and activism.

programme.title: Bruce Willis: All American Hero
programme.desc: Bruce Willis became a star with his iconic role as John McClane in Die Hard, leading to a legendary career with over 100 films. Known for his charm and humor, his career faced a tragic setback in 2022.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: With some of the most beautiful Greek temples on the Mediterranean, cities that just seem to float above the sea, and one of the most powerful volcanoes on Earth, this region of Italy feels like another world.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: See ancient sea caves, modern golf courses, mysterious formations, and treacherous predators along Africa's South Coast.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In Japan's southern islands of Kyushu and Shikoku, Adam Liaw finds a vibrant, warm culture where the cuisine is as fascinating as its people.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam ends his taste tour through Japan with a trip to the island of Okinawa, where he discovers an eclectic cuisine and learns the secret to long life.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Mena restaurant-hops with friends Lilly Singh and Laura Marano, indulging in plant-based French pastries, "pastrami" sammies, Thai "chicken" wings and "carne" asada.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam meets a tea master, a Maiko, and a Michelin chef who turns risotto into sushi in the thriving traditional culture of Kyoto.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw explores Japan's high-energy financial centre, Osaka, and finds the world's best fast food, a sumo wrestler turned chef, and soba noodles to die for.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S21)
programme.desc: In the Season 21 premiere, Sig and Johnathan head to abandoned Adak Island, chasing rumors of giant king crab.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD.

programme.title: Monster of Oz
programme.desc: In southwestern Australia, an unknown predator with a taste for great white and mako sharks ignites fears of sea monsters in the abyss.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh investigates the shocking rumours surrounding a Turkish dig site 6,000 years older than Stonehenge. Josh finds evidence of tribal skull rituals.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer is back in the UK! Along with ace mechanic Marc ‘Elvis’ Priestley, he’s on a mission to find and restore iconic cars to sell for a profit.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant revamps a 1972 beach buggy giving it a radical twist, but has he gone too far? And the scale of the farmhouse renovation starts to hit Ant.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight_S2 (S2)
programme.desc: The top eight No Prep drivers kick off the Great 8 Individual Championships in Virginia, racing to win $100,000.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S9)
programme.desc: The shop preps for the 2022 SEMA show in Las Vegas. Dave and Kev attend the first concours d'elegance, and their knowledge of cars is pushed to its limits.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: Incredible clips capture life's twists and turns. They include a mishap on a frozen lake, shocking road collisions and a close encounter with a whale.

programme.title: Wild & Weird America (S1)
programme.desc: The stakes are high with these crazy clips. There’s footage of a snowboarder surfing an avalanche, a thrilling kayaking rescue and a runaway boat.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S1)

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)

programme.title: High Speed Chase (S2)

programme.title: Who the Bloody Hell Are We? - Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Adam Liaw busts out of the kitchen and embarks on a journey into Australia's past to discover how people of Chinese descent fit into modern Australia's story.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 7
programme.desc: it's all systems go, with Queensland police, Emergency Services and other Paramedics teaming up to ensure patients are taken safely to hospital from a chaotic life-threatening situation.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - How Big Tech Is Making Fools of Us
programme.desc: Are you being fooled by disinformation? Hamish Macdonald examines that question as he meets with a range of participants, tech experts, nerds and disruptors to discover what's happening to our brains and belief systems.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 16
programme.desc: Chas and John discuss the events of the week after President Trump's Trip to China to meet with Xi Jinping. What does it mean for the global economy, security and relations between the two superpowers?

programme.title: National Press Club Address - Episode 17
programme.desc: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision-makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 101
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Poh Ling Yeow Returns
programme.desc: Friend and fellow cook Poh turns up with her favourite kitchen utensil and cooks Alice her go-to university snack.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 10
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich in culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you stories that matter to the Pacific and updated information from journalists with deep regional expertise. (Midseason Final)

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 11 - Hawthorn v Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - How Big Tech Is Making Fools of Us
programme.desc: Are you being fooled by disinformation? Hamish Macdonald examines that question as he meets with a range of participants, tech experts, nerds and disruptors to discover what's happening to our brains and belief systems.

programme.title: I was actually there - Nicky Winmar's Stand Against Racism
programme.desc: It's a day etched into Australian sporting folklore for all the wrong reasons. A moment on a footy field where Nicky Winmar, a proud Noongar man, called out racism.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 7
programme.desc: it's all systems go, with Queensland police, Emergency Services and other Paramedics teaming up to ensure patients are taken safely to hospital from a chaotic life-threatening situation.

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 101

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 80
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 80
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Books
programme.desc: Dr Karl pulls back the cover on how books are made, following 'The Great Gatsby' on its journey from pixels to pages at the Ligare book printers in Sydney. (Final)

programme.title: News Breakfast - From Dubbo
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Episode 14
programme.desc: Inspiring, entertaining and full of practical advice, join Costa Georgiadis and the team as they unearth gardening ideas, meet avid gardeners and look at some of the most inspiring gardens from across the country.

programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, at iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento, at kung paano magsulat ng kuwento at magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
